narrative:
Stokes Twp township has 3,360 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
